item.title: The Book Which Tells The Truth
item.description: The first book by Raël, the written testimony of his first several encounters with Yahweh. Read it for yourself # 📖 Rael I — The Book Which Tells The Truth See also # Resources › Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet Wiki › Raëlism External links # Download The Message | rael.org

item.title: Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet
item.description: The second book by Raël, also a written testimony of another encounter with Yahweh where he was taken to another planet. Read it for yourself # 📖 Rael II — Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet See also # Resources › The Book Which Tells The Truth Wiki › Raëlism External links # Download The Message | rael.org

item.title: L'Ère du Verseau: la Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste
item.description: A non-fiction book about the Aquarian Age and how that relates to the possibility of the biblical creation myth being extraterrestrial in nature. Read it for yourself # 📖 L'Ère du Verseau, la Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste See also # Wiki › Neo-Euhemerism External links # L'Ère du Verseau: Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste | Google Books

item.title: La Bibbia non è un libro sacro
Rael.org
item.description: Description # The following excerpt was directly taken from the web sites description: The true origin of life on Earth: Extraterrestrials created us in their image. Life has been scientifically created by extraterrestrials from another planet that we mistook for gods. They gave us a loving message, explaining how we came to be, thanks to science. See also # Wiki › Raëlism
